name: Add .gitattributes normalising EOL to LF + renormalise CRLF blobs
description: Repos that carry CRLF-encoded files without a `.gitattributes` directive normalising EOL to LF produce 'phantom diffs' on every checkout â€” git's autocrlf+core.eol heuristics rewrite CRLFâ†”LF round-trip, blocking rebases (observed on claude-integrations#43 2026-05-27). Fix: write a sensible `.gitattributes` AND `git add --renormalize .` to refresh the index.
match: Repo with tracked CRLF blobs but no `eol=lf` directive in `.gitattributes`
replacement: Write `.gitattributes` with `* text=auto eol=lf`, exempt `*.bat` (`text eol=crlf`), exempt declared binaries, then renormalise

discovery.root_cause: Repo had `.gitattributes` declaring `* text=auto eol=lf` but the BLOBS themselves were already CRLF in git's object store; without `git add --renormalize` the working-tree CRLFâ†’LF round-trip kept regenerating uncommittable diffs.
